items.title: Scholarship notice
items.body_text: This scholarship notice has a complete readable body and attachment evidence for a clean candidate classification in the diagnostic fixture.

items.title: Course registration notice
items.body_text: A non-scholarship notice is also fully readable, proving that one detected scholarship item does not substitute for item-level readability evidence.

items.title: Department schedule
items.body_text: Another ordinary readable item remains available for inspection and has no scholarship detector match.
